TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Gjorge_Ivanov, title = Gjorge_Ivanov, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gjorge_Ivanov} }

S.FORM: I 1960 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Gjorge Ivanov , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Macedonia anini i ci Gjorge Ivanov, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 12 a romi'ad. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *jo~ur*…ô ib~vano~ub~v , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ma ¶…ô…¨~…ģo~unia anini i ¶i *jo~ur*…ô ib~vano~ub~v, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. ńßis s…ô ¶o~un…¨~…ģ an…¨~…ģ tńß…ô …ĺast pr…ôsi…¨~…ģ…ôntia…ĺ t…ôrm …ôn…¨~…ģ…ô…¨~…ģ o~un ** maj ****.
S.FORM: I 1960 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Gjorge Ivanov , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Macedonia anini i ci Gjorge Ivanov, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 12 a romi'ad. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *jo~ur*…ô ib~vano~ub~v , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ma ¶…ô…¨~…ģo~unia anini i ¶i *jo~ur*…ô ib~vano~ub~v, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. ńßis s…ô ¶o~un…¨~…ģ an…¨~…ģ tńß…ô …ĺast pr…ôsi…¨~…ģ…ôntia…ĺ t…ôrm …ôn…¨~…ģ…ô…¨~…ģ o~un ** maj ****.
